title: Old Names Surface
theme: names of the cycle's earlier turns come back unbidden
worldEvent: old crows roost in places no crows have ever roosted; they answer to names that have not been spoken since the previous Year
narratorPromptFragment: The current world-chapter is BOOK II, CHAPTER 3: OLD NAMES SURFACE. Names from old turns of the cycle are coming back unbidden — small old names, not the famous ones. Some birds know them. Some doors. Reference forgotten names quietly when natural; do not invent specific ones.
